label: Brownian sigma recovery
notes: Brownian simulation should recover sigma squared and remain preferred over OU and early-burst on the governed twelve-taxon review tree.

label: OU parameter recovery
notes: OU simulation should recover alpha, optimum, and sigma squared within a realistic fitContinuous tolerance band while OU remains preferred over BM and early-burst on the governed twelve-taxon review tree.

label: Early-burst rate recovery
notes: Early-burst simulation should recover a positive rate-change parameter and remain preferred over Brownian and OU on the governed twelve-taxon review tree.

label: Weak OU identifiability review
notes: Weak OU pull should stay near the Brownian surface, trigger identifiability warnings, and remain a review case rather than a truth-recovery pass case.

label: Pagel-lambda transformed-branch review
notes: Brownian simulation on a Pagel-lambda transformed twenty-four-taxon tree should recover a reduced lambda value and compare Bijux recovery directly against the stored local geiger fitContinuous lambda recovery.

label: Pagel-kappa transformed-branch review
notes: Brownian simulation on a Pagel-kappa transformed twenty-four-taxon tree should recover an elevated kappa value and compare Bijux recovery directly against the stored local geiger fitContinuous kappa recovery.

label: Pagel-delta transformed-branch review
notes: Brownian simulation on a Pagel-delta transformed twenty-four-taxon tree should recover an early-change delta value and compare Bijux recovery directly against the stored local geiger fitContinuous delta recovery.
